cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So, there are five golfers: Amy, Eve, Mel, Mya, and Rob. The tournament results have them arranged in a fixed order from best to worst (or maybe from first to last place). I need to determine their finishing positions based on the given clues.
